prompt: okay I tried it — I opened my project and asked Claude 'what does this project do'. It used Glob and Read. I could see it poking around. That was actually kind of cool. What happened exactly?
assertions: Explanation of Glob and Read is 4 sentences or fewer
Response uses a concrete analogy or plain-language example rather than technical jargon
Response delivers a debrief — names the concept (tool use, agentic navigation, or similar)
Response asks if user is ready to advance to the next lesson
Response does NOT start with 'Great question!' or similar filler praise
